reviews.review_text: highly recommended! The place is beautiful and has all the facilities. the woman at the reception very friendly! I'm going back

Great service, nice and very tidy park.
Will definitely return.

What a lovely caravan park. We booked a budget cabin and knowing so, weren’t expecting a palatial cabin. It was clean, warm, had all the necessities and the most comfortable beds.
We had a nice overnight stay and definitely come back.
Great quality caravan park, amazing quiet location, good facilities.

Pleasantly surprised!
Isolated and quaint. Views for days and the staff are friendly and very helpfull.
Tumut half hour down the road for supplies.
One of the better caravan parks we have stayed at because of the tranquility :)
Camped unpowered excellent setup both the camp kitchen to amenities clean and tidy. Great service. Would recommend.
Clean and spacious park. Staff are friendly and if you are lucky enough to be there on a Monday night would highly recommend joining in the house made pizza.
War auf dem Caravanpark. Sehr freundlich und sauber.

We recently stayed at this caravan park and found it to be okay, but with a few things worth mentioning. The amenities were pretty average — clean enough, but nothing to rave about. The gardens were full of trees and flowers in bloom, which looked lovely but came with a very strong scent throughout the park, hayfever prone peoples worst nightmare. ||Unfortunately, the flies were pretty bad during the day and the mozzies were even worse after dark, so definitely bring repellent if you’re visiting this time of year.||Our caravan site itself was a good size and easy to locate, which was a big positive. However, we couldn’t use the pool as it was full of fallen flowers, and the playground was quite worn and damaged, which was disappointing for the kids.||Overall, it’s an okay stop for a night or two, but with a few improvements it could be much better. Two stars from us.
Nice park but at the moment it is full of pollen
Caravan site was good and level wit a nice view of the lake. Staff are friendly and the Monday night Pizza was delicious and value for money.
Staff are very welcoming and helpful |This is a must stop. So relaxing, such beautiful views. Everything is well maintained and exceptionally clean.

Lovely view, friendly staff. The "cabin" "5 berth water view" was very small, you'd be flat out managing with 3 kids in the space, really only comfortable for two adults. Tiny bathroom, more of a caravan than a cabin. Fine for an overnight stay.
We enjoyed our stay. The grounds are well kept, the manager was so helpful and friendly and the toilet blocks are very clean.
Great spot clean tidy friendly staff
Great spot for a coffee
We stayed here in our caravan, great amenities, service and love the fire pits for hire sooo good. It’s in the perfect spot with beautiful views.
A lovely, very tidy van park in a gorgeous holiday town. The owner was very friendly chap who went out of his way to help me with a small problem.
Wonderful park. Friendly staff & the Monday night pizzas are an 11 out of 10!!  The chicken one was absolutely perfect & so tasty.  Thank you, Ann

Lovely well maintained quiet park. Immaculate amenities and hands down best hot shower we’ve ever had at a caravan park. We had a private corner site on the gravel nice and close to amenities, will book grassed site for the views next time though it was still very nice. We will be back!
We stayed in a 5 berth waterview cabin. Great views, cosy in the cold weather. The park had everything we needed! Our kids enjoyed the parks in the town. Will be back.
Reception Has bacon Eggs Meat trays Milk and a selction of Groceries.They Do Pizza On a monday night

We made an online booking and before we were due to arrive we had major car problems and could not go through with our trip.
Diane at the  park was so understanding and helpful, I couldn’t recommend this business more.

Stayed in the Deluxe Cabin. Really nice place to stay with a simple 5 min walk to the Lake. Staff were lovely and even put the heater on before we rocked up so it was nice and warm for us. Lots to see around the area where this is located. Only thing I'd say is the TV in the deluxe rooms is in a bit of a awkward location, however, it isn't a deal breaker.
Great park. Huge flat drive through sites which are well maintained. Nice and grassy - no dirt and rocks.  Very friendly staff and super clean amenities.
Neat and tidy. Great location
Such a beautiful place in the summer! So excited to see it in the winter.

Wir waren 4 Nächte hier. Die Sanitäranlagen sind sauber, groß und ordentlich. Wir hatten einen Stellplatz am Ende, der Weg zu den Sanitäranlagen war etwas weit, aber nicht schlimm für uns. Der Platz war für uns ideal uns hat es gefallen. Es gab nicht weit von unserem Stellplatz ein WC. Die gesamte Anlage ist gut gepflegt und das Personal freundlich und hilfsbereit. Wir können den Platz weiterempfehlen.

The older part of the park was disappointing.  Toilets were too far away from sites 74 to 78 section and a short cut is too steep and a WH&S issue. This would be eliminated if steps could be cut into slope for access to disability toilet and camp kitchen.  I felt it was the worst set-out park I’ve ever stayed in which is sad 😢
Great spot, Di and Graham are terrific and those rooms have the best ever view. Move over Banff!
Idyllic panoramic friendly. Hope it can stay that way forever..wonderful customer service.

Great Holliday Park!
Friendly professional welcoming staff. We only needed a powered site for the night. The sites are excellent Flat ground & large in size. Close to town & Country club. Right on the waters edge. Great layout. A great stop on a weekend getaway from the city. Yarongabilly caves & hot springs are just up the road. We highly recomend Talbingo holliday park. We give it ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ &👍🏾👍🏼
Rude and unfriendly service from the owners. Pity as it could be a great place but you are made to feel unwelcome.
Absolutely beautiful holiday spot! The staff were so helpful and so friendly, nothing was a problem. I cannot wait to go back!!

We stayed in the three bedroom lake front cabins. They were exceptionally clean and had excellent amenities including a very clean washing machine and dryer. The balcony was spacious and well furnished, and we enjoyed a few bbq’s on the private balcony bbq. ||Reception were helpful and friendly. We really enjoyed our stay and look forward to returning again soon.
Awesome getaway destination!
Great little park, clean amenities, helpful staff and roomy sites

Set in a beautiful little town close to the caves … we booked a “delux cabin” probably wouldn’t recommend. Although the cabin is fairly new the placement is very disappointing… they are right up the back of the park amongst permanent residents … seems almost like they were just plonked there as only  room left. In the park … honestly would have just booked an older cabin more towards the front of the park with a better view for less money if I stayed again

Talbingo Caravan Park. Was there a week for work in the area. Can’t thank them enough. Friendly service. Cabins well appointed. Pool (which I forgot to take swimmers) Electric BBQ on the deck of some of the cabins. Would definitely take the family.

Campground aan de rand van het stuwmeer bij Talbingo. Klein plaatsje even weg van doorgaande weg naar van het Kosciuszko National Park. Goede uitvalsbasis basis voor o.a. een bezoek aan de grotten van Yarrangobily

Close to talbingo dam. Cheap cabins.
Busy during the holiday season.
Owners are very nice.
Beautiful and clean staff are friendly and helpful to
Amazing place to meet up with family. Everything is clean and tidy. Great service and close to places of interest.

Well planned out park . Easy access grassed sites for big rigs . Excellent views over Journama Ponds and back drop of the mountains. Lovely modern facilities and camp kitchen large and well equiped even a pot belly heater. The hosts were most obliging and helpful
Magnificent  views over the mountains. Lake etc. Close to town.

We stayed here for three nights. We had Villa 1, it's was new, very clean, fantastic views and everything we needed.

The owners were friendly and helpful. We had to bake a cake for our son's birthday and so we borrowed a couple of cake tins.
The location is just out of Talbingo proper, but nothing is really that far, 5min walk to the local strip of shops and a larger kids playground.

Very quiet out of holiday times and beautiful views.

This place is quiet, clean and so beautiful. |We appreciate managers, Sarah (receptionist) and Michael (Sarah's husband). All of them are friendly and so kind.|We recommend Talbingo Tourist Caravan Park and will come back there.|Thanks for supporting us and many thanks again for everything.|Tri Duong

One of the best tourist parks we have stayed at. Dianne was exceptional at keeping me posted on the snow conditions at Selwyn and we got a brand new cabin, classy!! The resort is perfect for a long weekend at Yarrangobilly caves and thermal pool, Selwyn snow resort and a quiet holiday away from the common touristic spots. Plenty of wildlife on the roads so try to get to your destination before dark. The beautiful Nd serene tumut River is a great place for those morning walks.

I stayed in a two room cabin. They're fairly old and showing it - walls provide visual privacy but no sound barrier. Management is friendly, honest and helpful. Beautiful lake nearby - would love to visit when the days are longer. About 40m drive to Selwyn.
Warm and inviting place. The lake view apartments were cheap and perfect for my stay.
Budget friendly,  locations great. Rooms are great and very comfortable.  Contains necessities.  Friendly staff

Although we have to cancel our stay since Mt Selwyn is temporarily closed due to no snow. I am so impressed with the way Talbingo Caravan Park operated. Not only they informed me that Mt Selwyn is closed and ask if I want to rearrange to another day. But also promptly processed my cancellation one day before our booking. It gave us time to find another place near Perisher so we don't have to disappoint my Children who has been waiting for this trip for long time. Hopefully, we can come back here next year :)
Stayed in the 2 bedroom apartment. Clean, comfortable, warm. Will be back soon hopefully.

The service here is absolutely terrible. When I checked in, there was absolutely no greetings whatsoever. The lady at the reception gave us no welcome into the place { she might need a break from work }. Despite the bad service the location and the villa itself was great.
Lovely place to stay. Very clean comfortable room, awesome view and friendly staff. We really enjoyed our stay. Will stay in future as well.

Location is amazing… lovely views and beautiful little town. Nice and quiet location. Female manager was not welcoming. We felt like she just wanted us out of the office as quick as possible and felt like a burden to her. No friendly smile or gesture upon arriving after a long trip, that part was disappointing. The Park definitely needs some much needed upgrades. The price is great though. I wouldn’t stay there again unfortunately.

If you’re looking for somewhere to stay thats close to the snowfields and Kosciusko National Park, then Talbingo Caravan Park is just the place.

It’s also close to one of the snowy river hydroelectric dams so you can learn about how this feat of engineering came about and maybe do a spot of fishing while your at it.
